# Synapse-Network-Docs Agent Map

This repository is the GitHub funnel and agent-readable map for Synapse AgentPay docs.

## Read First

1. `README.md` - public GitHub billboard and fast agent quickstart.
2. `llm-instructions.md` - compact prompt rules for coding agents.
3. `examples/` - copyable first-call examples.
4. `docs/` - lightweight links into the staging docs site.

## Canonical Product Docs

- SDK hub: https://staging.synapse-network.ai/docs/sdk
- Python SDK: https://staging.synapse-network.ai/docs/sdk/python
- TypeScript SDK: https://staging.synapse-network.ai/docs/sdk/typescript
- Concepts: https://staging.synapse-network.ai/docs/concepts
- Contracts: https://staging.synapse-network.ai/docs/contracts

## V1 Docs Contribution Rule

Do not add "Edit this page" links to the product docs site until the rendered docs pages are generated from this repository. Use GitHub Issues for docs feedback in V1.

## Agent Runtime Rule

Agent integrations should prefer `SynapseClient` with an `agt_xxx` Agent Key. Do not use owner wallet or `SynapseAuth` flows unless the user explicitly asks for owner/admin setup.
